title: Get regression suite working
description:
Why this issue exists and what needs to be done:

The SQL regression suite is not currently in a usable passing state. We need a tracked P0 task to restore the ability to run the suite reliably and drive failures down until the expected baseline is working again.

Scope:
- identify why the regression harness is currently failing or unusable
- fix the blocking infrastructure and/or SQL behavior regressions needed to make the suite run
- update expected outputs only where behavior changes are intentional and justified
- document the remaining known failures if full green is not achievable in one pass

Validation:
- the regression harness runs successfully from a clean checkout
- the suite passes, or any remaining failures are explicitly tracked in follow-up beads issues
acceptance_criteria: Regression harness runs from a clean checkout and failures are either fixed or tracked in follow-up issues.
notes: Initial panic/hang triage found the first reported crash was a false positive from scripts/run_regression_one_by_one.sh splitting dollar-quoted PL/pgSQL bodies at internal semicolons. Patched the splitter and matching statement parser so dollar-quoted blocks stay intact. Targeted rerun on create_function_sql and an early broad rerun now show no crash/timeout markers in the covered slice.

title: Adjust beads closeout for local-only workflow
description: Why this issue exists and what needs to be done: AGENTS.md still requires remote push steps, but this repo is not using remote beads sync right now. Update the documented session-completion workflow to stop at local commit and note that remote sync is optional until remote access is configured.
